title: aralia nudicaulis f. prolifera
intro: Aralia nudicaulis f. prolifera, also known as the American ginseng or wild sarsaparilla, is a variant of the Aralia nudicaulis plant that grows in the northeastern United States and southeastern Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Aralia nudicaulis f. prolifera include improved immune function, reduced blood pressure, and relief from stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and processing the roots, which can be taken in tea, capsule, or tincture form.
